test_sufficiency_summary: Sufficient. Coverage verifies movement completion at PH_MOVE entry for the pre-seeded station orbit, preserves orbit distance/heading/speed assertions, keeps non-station route behavior covered, and aligns the mechanics-source assertion with the resetMovementState() -> checkMoveStatus() path.
documentation_accuracy_summary: Accurate. doc/DesignNotes.md documents the resetMovementState() -> checkMoveStatus() bookkeeping path and the PH_MOVE-entry auto-complete behavior in a way that matches the implementation and passing tactical regressions.

findings.summary: Tester report cites stale test names
findings.details: The report references testStationOrbitalMovementAutoCompletesMovePhase and testNonStationMoveSelectionStillBuildsMovementRoute, but the actual verified fixture methods are testStationMoveAlreadyCompleteAtPhaseEntry and testNonStationHeadingUnchangedByFix in tests/tactical/FTacticalStationOrbitalMovementTest.cpp:123 and :188.
